value.title: Amazon Stock Slips Below Key Level. Why It's A Rough Day For Cloud Hyperscaler Stocks.
value.summary: Amazon stock broke below its 200-day line as it continued a slump that has wiped out its rally from April.

value.title: Amazon's Next Big Move Into Big-Box Retail Could Be a Smart Move
value.summary: The e-commerce giant's new store concept includes a feature that could make a key difference to sales.

value.title: 5 Top Google AI Brains Bolted in 7 Days as Gemini Falls Behind, and Alphabet Stock Is Feeling It
value.summary: Five researchers out of Google’s core AI team in seven days, and the market noticed. Alphabet (NASDAQ:GOOGL) shares fell 5.09% over the past week to $345.29, and dropped another 1.14% Thursday morning to $341.34. The catalyst is talent, the subtext is product, and the spread between the two is where investors are getting nervous.
